status.comment: Most up-to-date world state. Use as the basis for simulation.

input.instruction: - DO NOT copy content from preceding , , or tags. - DO NOT output an "updated status bar". Output ONLY newly generated story content. - Output in {$LANGUAGE_SELECTOR} regardless of prompt language. - NEVER perform actions, dialogue, or describe internal thoughts for {$PC_NAME}. Only describe the world's reaction to the user's input.
